new_value: Completed LR1110 Zephyr driver extension (init/config/TX/RX/CAD per Semtech lib+manual), board defs+validation for ThinkNode M3/M6+T1000-E, renode sim/Kconfig/tests. 3 codereview passes, west build PASS on targets. Scoped to driver/boards/tests. Independent test vectors. All closed.
